directive.title: Database schema foundation with Drizzle ORM

auditor.summary: The generated code is critically incomplete. Only 3 of the 8 required files were generated (package.json, .gitignore, .env.local.example, and drizzle.config.ts). The 4 core implementation files (schema.ts, connection.ts, migrate.ts, audit.ts) plus the types file and migration SQL file are all missing. This represents a 50% file completion rate for the critical implementation files. The build cannot function as a database schema implementation without these core files. The package.json has some dependency issues but is otherwise correctly structured. The drizzle.config.ts is properly configured. However, the absence of the schema, connection, migration, audit, and types files means 7 of 8 acceptance criteria fail completely. This build requires substantial additional work before it can be considered functional.

top_issues.description: Required file not generated. This is the core schema definition file containing all table definitions, relationships, and field types. Without it, the entire database schema is missing.
Required file not generated. This file should implement database connection with connection pooling (max 20 connections) for Vercel compatibility.
Required file not generated. This file should implement the migration runner for applying schema changes.
